scenarios.name: migrate-openai-to-routerbase
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B omits the required client initialization, base URL, API key handling, and smoke test.

scenarios.name: design-fallback-routing
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets almost all rubric requirements, only deviating slightly by using a custom retry check instead of the specified isRetryableRouterBaseError, whereas Response B lacks the required array, retry logic, and smoke test.

scenarios.name: generate-image-with-routerbase
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A uses a different endpoint and omits required fields.
